creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
Hi,

> Or just upgrade x11-wm/afterstep, which has been stuck at 1.0 for a
> couple of years. I asked the maintainer of that port (jfitz) a few
> days ago but haven't heard back from him.

Nope - we want to leave 1.0 as a backup for people who like the old AS.  

> While I'm here: Brett, could you confirm whether as1.6 has the same
> problems for you?

You probably won't hear from AS developers on this - they all use Linux of
some sort and don't seem to have any experience w/ CVS less yet CVSup from
what I've gathered.

I'll check tomorrow for the CVSup problem - I'm at home and have a weird
DHCP thing where I can't use the GUI due to my IP not being resolved.
(the same non-resolving IP address causes me not to be able to set my X
display to my home machine either).  :-P

Brett
